title: eryngium ciliatum
intro: Eryngium ciliatum, also known as Sea Holly, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its distinctive spiky flowers and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eryngium ciliatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Eryngium ciliatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
